name: Feeds
summary: Bluesky and X timelines on your glasses.
description: Read your social feeds on the HUD. Bluesky needs no account; X connects through an in-app sign-in. Threads, images, and swipe navigation, rendered as structured cards.
author: Anezium

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About

Read your social feeds on the HUD. Bluesky needs no account; X connects through an in-app sign-in. Threads, images, and swipe navigation, rendered as structured cards.

releases.notes:
- First release as a headless plugin APK.
- Bluesky and X timelines on the HUD (X via account session or WebView
  capture).
- In-plugin X sign-in; targeted cookie expiry on disconnect.
- Kit settings screen with per-source configuration and uninstall.

### Artifact

- File: `feeds-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `e41a56bb156ea6ee73083101080d318fee29a945fd04613b211032e1346e38bb`
